title: helianthemum variabile f. plantagineum
intro: Helianthemum variabile f. plantagineum, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant species within the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rock Rose typically involve infusions, tinctures, or salves made from the plant's leaves, flowers, or roots, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
